[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / constrain

# Method: constrain()

```ts
constrain(
   value, 
   low, 
   high): number;
```

Constrain a value between a minimum and maximum range.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Value to constrain. |
| `low` | `number` | Minimum allowable value. |
| `high` | `number` | Maximum allowable value. |

## Returns

`number`

The constrained value.

## Example
